findings.description: Knowledge file shows `DateUtil.getDays("20110302", "20110302")` but the source shows `DateUtil.getDate("20110302", "20110302")` for this example. The knowledge file changed the method name in the code snippet.
findings.source_evidence:
// 同日を指定した場合
DateUtil.getDate("20110302", "20110302"); // -> 0

findings.description: The source includes a 'yyyyMM形式で1ヶ月減算する場合' example (`DateUtil.addMonth(date, 1); // -> 201102`) that is omitted from the knowledge file. Even though this example appears to contain a bug in the source (positive 1 with decremented result), it is present in the source and should be represented.
The source includes a third getMonthEndDate example (`DateUtil.getMonthEndDate("201104"); // -> 20110431`) that is omitted from the knowledge file.
